title: It'S Not My Fault
lyrics:
*whispered*
Okay, not my fault!

[verse]
Salt in the cake? Rude!
Dog in the vault—his mood!
Tried to stop, it flew!
Milkshake’s gone—wasn’t me!

*parent:* "Why the dog?"
*whisper-yell* Dog! Duh!

[chorus]
IT’S Not MY Fault!
Not my fault—no way!
IT’S Not MY Fault!
Snack time? *crunch*

[verse]
Jumped too high—oops!
Poked my bro—he’s fine!
Game reset? Not me!
Zapped myself—nope!

*parent:* "You poked who?"
*giggle* Bro. He did first!

[chorus]
IT’S Not MY Fault!
Cat’s just purrin’!
IT’S Not MY Fault!
Cookie? *munch*

[verse]
Door fell off? Not me!
Colt kicked first—mean!
Yelled “Too cold!”—no lie!
Treehouse hole? Not mine!

*parent:* "You yelled when?"
*whisper* Ice. *shiver*

[chorus]
IT’S Not MY Fault!
Not my fault—nope!
IT’S Not MY—*yawn*—fault…
…Cookie’s gone?
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, ukulele and lo-fi beat, warm and fun, 105 BPM, singalong energy, gentle bass bounce, soft vocal not shouty, bedtime fun not daytime energy, cozy song you'd hum in bed
cover_description: Kid pointing at dog eating cake, milkshake spilled, treehouse half-collapsed.
rhyme_family: salt, vault, halt, malt, exalt, assault, default, jolt, bolt, colt, revolt,holt, molt, volt, stilt, guilt, tilt, built, quilts, results
